basic_details.job_title: Rubber Board Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website rubberboard.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 30 years as on 01/01/26
age_limit.details: Not more than 30 years as on 01/01/26

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Equivalent with First class from any recognized University with 2 years' post qualification experience in civil construction works, estimation, preparation of bills etc.
qualification.details: Junior Engineer Civil: B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Equivalent with First class from any recognized University with 2 years' post qualification experience in civil construction works, estimation, preparation of bills etc.

salary_details.details: Rs.30,000/- per month along with travel benefits (TA/DA)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: rubberboard.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Rubber Board Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Engineer Civil: B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Equivalent with First class from any recognized University with 2 years' post qualification experience in civil construction works, estimation, preparation of bills etc.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Not more than 30 years as on 01/01/26

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs.30,000/- per month along with travel benefits (TA/DA)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: rubberboard.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Rubber Board Junior Engineer Civil recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Junior Engineer Civil post is 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Engineer Civil post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech in Civil Engineering or equivalent with First Class from a recognized University, along with 2 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Engineer Civil position?
faq.answer: The age limit is not more than 30 years as on 01/01/2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Engineer Civil post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month, along with travel benefits (TA/DA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it along with self-attested copies of relevant documents to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Engineer Civil post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Engineer Civil post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Rubber Board located?
faq.answer: The Rubber Board is located in Kottayam, Kerala, with the pincode 686009.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Engineer Civil role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Test and/or Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Does the Rubber Board offer any relaxation in age?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data, so candidates should refer to the official notification for any such provisions.
